Dialogs.description: Named dialog definitions for prompting users to enter or select data

QueryDialogName.description: Unique identifier for this dialog definition

DialogCaption.description: Title text shown in the dialog window (default: 'Query Tool')

HideColumns.description: Column names or indexes to hide from the results grid

AllowDuplicates.description: Allows selecting the same record multiple times

ButtonTag.description: Text label for the ribbon button that opens this dialog (default: 'Select')

ColumnOrder.description: Column indexes defining the display order in the results grid

DropDownColumns.description: Columns to render as dropdown filters with values from the data

SearchType.description: Search mode: 'Standard' for field-specific search, 'Fuzzy' for all-fields search

SearchBoxCount.description: Number of search boxes shown in Standard search mode (default: 1)

ShowAutotextPanel.description: Shows the AutoText selection panel in the dialog

ShowSearchPanel.description: Shows the search/filter panel in the dialog

ImageRoot.description: Base path for images referenced in the dialog

SingleSelectionOnly.description: Limits selection to one record and hides the multi-select grid

SearchText.description: Pre-populates the search box with this text when dialog opens

SearchBoxFields.description: Maps search box identifiers to field names they filter on

DialogWidth.description: Dialog window width in pixels at 96 DPI (default: 800)

DialogHeight.description: Dialog window height in pixels at 96 DPI (default: 600)

AutoColumnWidthThreshold.description: Maximum auto-sized column width in pixels before capping (default: 600)

AutoColumnWidthDefault.description: Width applied to columns exceeding AutoColumnWidthThreshold (default: 400)

AlwaysShowDialog.description: Shows dialog even when SearchText returns exactly one result

ShowPleaseWait.description: Shows 'Please Wait...' message during slow data loads (AD, Azure AD)

QueryPanel.description: Custom query panel definitions for advanced filtering
